title: Ensemble
body: ## Ensemble adds playable musical instruments to minecraft! Use your keyboard to play your favourite tunes with your friends! ![Preview of the in-game GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e677b016ca32f65e32eed54924ce974caab3e929.png) ## As of now Ensemble adds 1 instrument : ### Euphonium ![Crafting recipe for the euphonium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85272c7806676f2abc59559377449a72fd9eda92.png) ![Player holding a euphonium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c4d66b1e43cfb4c9fe4763770d80e552b911b0b_0.webp) More instruments are planned for future releases! Other plans for future releases include : - Semitones - Different colored variants of instruments - More input customization - Decorative objects related to music
